(German pronunciation: [[ˈʊntɐˌɡiːzɪŋ ˈhaʁlaxɪŋ]](/wiki/Help:IPA/Standard_German "Help:IPA/Standard German"); [Central Bavarian](/wiki/Central_Bavarian "Central Bavarian"): *Untagiasing-Harlaching*) is the [18th borough of](/wiki/Boroughs_of_Munich "Boroughs of Munich") [Munich](/wiki/Munich "Munich"), Germany, mostly the districts of **Untergiesing** (lit. 'Lower [Giesing](/wiki/Giesing "Giesing")') and **Harlaching**. The borough's western border is the river [Isar](/wiki/Isar "Isar"), in the south it borders on [Grünwald](/wiki/Gr%C3%BCnwald,_Bavaria "Grünwald, Bavaria") and the [Perlacher Forst](/w/index.php?title=Perlacher_Forst&action=edit&redlink=1 "Perlacher Forst (page does not exist)") [[German-language Wiki: Perlacher Forst].](https://de.wikipedia.org/wiki/Perlacher_Forst "de:Perlacher Forst") (Perlach Forest), to the north-west on the Munich borough of [Obergiesing](/wiki/Obergiesing "Obergiesing") and to the north on the borough of [Au-Haidhausen](/wiki/Au-Haidhausen "Au-Haidhausen").

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

(Redirected from [Untergiesing](/w/index.php?title=Untergiesing&redirect=no "Untergiesing"))

Borough of Munich, Germany

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/b/b6/M%C3%BCnchen_-_Stadtbezirk_18_%28Karte%29_-_Untergiesing_-_Harlaching.png/250px-M%C3%BCnchen_-_Stadtbezirk_18_%28Karte%29_-_Untergiesing_-_Harlaching.png)](/wiki/File:M%C3%BCnchen_-_Stadtbezirk_18_(Karte)_-_Untergiesing_-_Harlaching.png)

The borough's position in Munich

**Untergiesing-Harlaching** (German pronunciation: [[ˈʊntɐˌɡiːzɪŋ ˈhaʁlaxɪŋ]](/wiki/Help:IPA/Standard_German "Help:IPA/Standard German"); [Central Bavarian](/wiki/Central_Bavarian "Central Bavarian"): *Untagiasing-Harlaching*) is the [18th borough of](/wiki/Boroughs_of_Munich "Boroughs of Munich") [Munich](/wiki/Munich "Munich"), Germany, mostly the districts of **Untergiesing** (lit. 'Lower [Giesing](/wiki/Giesing "Giesing")') and **Harlaching**. The borough's western border is the river [Isar](/wiki/Isar "Isar"), in the south it borders on [Grünwald](/wiki/Gr%C3%BCnwald,_Bavaria "Grünwald, Bavaria") and the [Perlacher Forst](/w/index.php?title=Perlacher_Forst&action=edit&redlink=1 "Perlacher Forst (page does not exist)") [[German-language Wiki: Perlacher Forst].](https://de.wikipedia.org/wiki/Perlacher_Forst "de:Perlacher Forst") (Perlach Forest), to the north-west on the Munich borough of [Obergiesing](/wiki/Obergiesing "Obergiesing") and to the north on the borough of [Au-Haidhausen](/wiki/Au-Haidhausen "Au-Haidhausen").

## Subdivisions

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Untergiesing-Harlaching&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Subdivisions")]

### Untergiesing

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Untergiesing-Harlaching&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Untergiesing")]

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/9/9f/Munich_Auer-Muehlbach_Untergiesing_Lohstra%C3%9Fe_bridge%26trees.jpg/250px-Munich_Auer-Muehlbach_Untergiesing_Lohstra%C3%9Fe_bridge%26trees.jpg)](/wiki/File:Munich_Auer-Muehlbach_Untergiesing_Lohstra%C3%9Fe_bridge%26trees.jpg)

[Auer Mühlbach](/wiki/Auer_M%C3%BChlbach "Auer Mühlbach") river in Untergiesing

Untergiesing comprises the borough's northern end, limited by the river in the west, the high cliff on the east, the *Humboltstraße* to the north, and the *[Candidstraße](/wiki/Candidstra%C3%9Fe "Candidstraße")*, part of Munich's [Mittlerer Ring](/wiki/Mittlerer_Ring "Mittlerer Ring") ring road system, to the south.

### Siebenbrunn

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Untergiesing-Harlaching&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Siebenbrunn")]

*Siebenbrunn* is located south of Untergiesing, sandwiched between the high cliff to the east and the river to the west. An important landmark is the [Tierpark Hellabrunn](/wiki/Tierpark_Hellabrunn "Tierpark Hellabrunn") (Munich Zoo), located in the district's southwest area, on the river.

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/9/9b/TierparkHellabrunn_aerial_view.jpg/250px-TierparkHellabrunn_aerial_view.jpg)](/wiki/File:TierparkHellabrunn_aerial_view.jpg)

View over Siebenbrunn with the [Munich Zoo](/wiki/Tierpark_Hellabrunn "Tierpark Hellabrunn")

### Harlaching and Neuharlaching

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Untergiesing-Harlaching&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Harlaching and Neuharlaching")]

The *Klinikum Harlaching* hospital, which opened on 18 November 1899, is located in the Harlaching district.
